creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

That would cover up a the problem. gnome-doc-utils is supposed to bring in  
docbook-xml-4.3 and -4.4. However due to a pkg bug this didn't happen. 
It has been fixed in pkg 1.2.1, you need to remove the gnome-doc-utils 
package from your repo and rebuild it to build a correct package.
